step.name: inventory
step.action: Walk dir tree; classify each as source / tests / generated / vendored / docs.

step.name: audit-pairs
step.action: For each source dir, check AGENTS.md + CLAUDE.md presence + line count + sections.

step.name: draft-missing
step.action: For each missing / stale dir, run templates/doc-outline.sh; draft AGENTS.md 20-80 lines.

step.name: ride-along-pairs
step.action: For each draft, create CLAUDE.md with single line `@AGENTS.md`.
step.decision-gate: If a dir already has a different CLAUDE.md content, escalate — don't overwrite without owner sign-off.

step.name: land-docs-pr
step.action: Open one PR. Add CI check: AGENTS.md ≤120 lines, has required sections.
